title: CNBC Daily Open: Iran deal fuels global relief rally
summary_full: Iran peace deal sparks a global relief rally in stocks amid hopes that the end of the war will ease the energy crisis impacting economies worldwide.
summary_public: Iran peace deal sparks a global relief rally in stocks amid hopes that the end of the war will ease the energy crisis impacting economies worldwide.

IR.label: positive
